The World of Warhammer 40K


As you step into the 41st Millennium, you enter humanity's darkest hour—a vast, star-spanning empire where hope flickers like a guttering candle against the encroaching night. The Imperium of Man stretches across countless worlds, a bloated, xenophobic theocracy where billions die in the Emperor's name each day. Here, you'll navigate a galaxy shaped by ten thousand years of warfare, treachery, and desperation, where ancient technologies are venerated as holy relics and the cost of survival is measured in blood and souls.

Your journey will take you across the grim darkness of the far future—from colossal hive cities where billions toil in polluted squalor, to war-torn battlefields where armies clash beneath alien skies, to haunted space hulks drifting through the Immaterium, and forgotten worlds where terrible secrets lie buried beneath the ruins of fallen civilizations. The choices you make will be forged in this crucible of constant conflict—will you stand as humanity's bulwark against extinction, succumb to the corrupting whispers of Chaos, or carve your own path through a galaxy that knows only war?

Each faction you encounter—zealous Space Marines, implacable Necrons, savage Orks, enigmatic Aeldari, ravenous Tyranids, insidious Chaos cults—represents
